seoTitle: How to Make Tickets on Canva Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to make tickets on Canva for events, concerts, or parties using customizable templates you can print or share digitally.
intro: Designing tickets for an event doesn't require professional printing software — Canva's templates and customization tools cover everything from concerts to corporate events. This guide walks through creating a set of tickets from start to finish.

steps.heading: Choose a ticket template
steps.body: Search Canva for 'ticket' templates and pick a style that matches your event.

steps.heading: Add event details
steps.body: Update the template with your event name, date, time, and venue information.

steps.heading: Customize colors and branding
steps.body: Adjust the design's colors and fonts to match your event's theme or brand.

steps.heading: Add a QR code or ticket number if needed
steps.body: Include a QR code for digital check-in or a unique number for tracking, using Canva's QR code tool.

steps.heading: Export and print or share
steps.body: Download your tickets as a PDF for printing, or share them digitally if the event supports e-tickets.

faq.question: Can I create numbered tickets for a large event?
faq.answer: Yes, you can duplicate the design and manually update ticket numbers, or use Canva's Bulk Create feature with a data list.

faq.question: Does Canva support QR codes on tickets?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva has a built-in QR code generator you can add directly to your ticket design.

faq.question: Are ticket templates free in Canva?
faq.answer: Many are free, with some premium designs available under Canva Pro.

faq.question: What size should event tickets be?
faq.answer: Standard ticket sizes vary, but Canva offers common presets, or you can set a custom size to match your printer.
